Smart Irrigation for Sacramento Yards

Custom irrigation solutions designed for our hot valley climate. We help homeowners conserve water while keeping landscapes thriving all year.

Call Now: 555-irr-r91

Get a FREE Estimate Today!

Rooted in Sacramento Soil

Founded in 2012, Summit Irrigation grew from a small family operation servicing Midtown bungalows to a trusted provider across the Sacramento Valley. Our founder's background in agriculture gave us unique insight into Central Valley irrigation challenges.

Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to the most common questions about our irrigation services.

How long does a new irrigation system installation take?

Most residential installations in Sacramento take 2-3 days, depending on property size and complexity. We work efficiently to minimize disruption to your daily life.

What's the best system for my drought-tolerant landscaping?

For native plant gardens common in our area, we typically recommend drip irrigation with smart controls. This provides precise watering at the root zone while minimizing evaporation loss during hot days.

Do you handle the permit process?

Yes, we manage all required permits with Sacramento County and local municipalities, including backflow prevention device testing and certification.

Reviews From Our Irrigation Customers

See what our satisfied customers have to say about their experience.

"Summit transformed our East Sac backyard into a water-efficient oasis. They designed a custom drip system for our native plant garden that accounts for the different sun exposure on each side of our house. Three summers later, our plants are healthier than ever and our water bill is 40% lower. The team even came back to tweak the system after the first month at no extra charge."

Martha R. Drip Irrigation Installation

"When a broken sprinkler line started flooding our Roseville yard on a 105-degree day, Summit had a technician out within two hours. They not only fixed the immediate leak but diagnosed an underlying issue with our clay soil shifting that had caused the break. Their repair has held strong through two summers of extreme heat."

James T. Emergency Repair

"We were skeptical about smart controllers but took advantage of the SMUD rebate Summit told us about. The system has been fantastic - it automatically adjusted watering during last September's heat wave and again during those unexpected November rains. Best part? We monitored and controlled everything from our phones while visiting family in Oregon."

Lisa and Dan W. Smart Controller Installation
